days.day_title: Arrival in Tokyo and Exploration of Asakusa

rows.title: Senso-ji Temple
rows.notes: For a unique perspective of Senso-ji Temple, head to the quiet corner of Asakusa Shrine directly behind the main temple.
rows.planning_note: Start your trip with a visit to Senso-ji Temple to avoid crowds and enjoy a peaceful experience. The early afternoon provides a serene atmosphere after your morning arrival.

rows.title: Lunch at Asakusa Menchi
rows.notes: Try the famous minced meat cutlet. The secret ingredient is its special batter and delicious soy-based sauce.
rows.planning_note: Asakusa Menchi is located right in the heart of Asakusa, perfect for a hearty lunch after exploring Senso-ji.

rows.title: Mokuhankan: Craft Your Own Ukiyo-e
rows.notes: Position yourself at the back of the workshop for a closer view of the master printer’s technique.
rows.planning_note: Spend your afternoon engaging in traditional Japanese culture. This workshop offers a relaxing yet immersive experience perfect for easing into Tokyo's bustling environment.

rows.title: Dinner at Daikokuya Tempura
rows.notes: Known for its famed tempura, a must-try specialty in Asakusa.
rows.planning_note: Cap off your first day in Tokyo with traditional tempura, a staple in Asakusa. Located near Senso-ji, it offers a convenient and delicious dinner option.

rows.title: Shibuya Scramble Crossing
rows.notes: For a unique perspective, climb to the rooftop terrace of the Shibuya 109 building just after dusk.
rows.planning_note: Kick off the day by experiencing the iconic Shibuya Scramble Crossing in the morning light. It's a less crowded and energetic view before the bustle of daily business.

rows.title: Meiji Shrine
rows.notes: Stand quietly near the torii gate during a light rain for a serene ambiance.
rows.planning_note: After the lively Shibuya, enjoy a peaceful morning by visiting Meiji Shrine, one of Tokyo's most important and serene cultural sites.

rows.title: Lunch at Harajuku Gyoza Lou
rows.notes: Famous for its delightful and budget-friendly gyoza.
rows.planning_note: Fuel up with delicious gyoza at one of Harajuku’s tucked-away gems before continuing your day.

rows.title: Shopping in Harajuku
rows.notes: Explore Takeshita Street for unique fashion finds.
rows.planning_note: Spend your afternoon browsing the trendy shops and taking in the colorful fashion scene of Harajuku. It’s a vibrant, youthful contrast to the serenity of Meiji Shrine.

rows.title: Dinner at Ichiran Ramen
rows.notes: Indulge in tonkotsu ramen in this popular chain known for its solo dining booths.
rows.planning_note: Finish your day with a satisfying bowl of ramen at the famous Ichiran. Enjoy the unique private booths designed to enhance your dining focus.

days.day_title: Cultural Deep Dive in Ueno and Yanaka

rows.title: Ueno Park Cherry Blossoms
rows.notes: Visit the hilltop near Tokyo Metropolitan Art Museum for views.
rows.planning_note: Enjoy a peaceful morning wander through Ueno Park, with its historical significance and beautiful landscapes - the perfect start to a morning of cultural exploration.

rows.title: Yanaka District Walk
rows.notes: Explore side alleys for artisan shops.
rows.planning_note: Discover Tokyo’s old-world charm with a walk through Yanaka, exploring its artisanal shops and traditional streets — a stark and pleasant contrast to the bustling city.

rows.title: Lunch at Kayaba Coffee
rows.notes: Known for delightful dorayaki and nostalgic ambiance.
rows.planning_note: Relax and recharge with a coffee and sweet treats at Kayaba Coffee in the heart of Yanaka, perfectly reflecting the area's nostalgic charm.

rows.title: Yanaka Art Walk
rows.notes: Explore hidden galleries for undiscovered art pieces.
rows.planning_note: End your cultural day by indulging in the artistic side of Yanaka with an art-focused walk. This leisurely activity allows your mind to wander as much as your feet.

rows.title: Dinner at Suzuran
rows.notes: Experience modern Japanese cuisine with a twist.
rows.planning_note: Cap off your evening with a delightful dining experience at Suzuran, known for its modern take on Japanese classics.

rows.title: Teamlab Borderless
rows.notes: Check out the 'Forest of Lamps' for a unique view.
rows.planning_note: Start your day with a fascinating dive into interactive art at TeamLab Borderless, where you can escape Tokyo’s hustle and melt into a world of digital interaction.

rows.title: Lunch at Aqua City Odaiba
rows.notes: Explore various dining options with views of Tokyo Bay.
rows.planning_note: Choose from a range of eateries at Aqua City, and soak in views of the bay — an ideal lunch break before further exploration.

rows.title: Explore Odaiba
rows.notes: Visit the top of Aqua City for the best views of Rainbow Bridge and Tokyo Tower.
rows.planning_note: Spend the afternoon in Odaiba, balancing technology with stunning bay views. Perfect spot for low-pressure exploration and scenic relaxation.

rows.title: Tokyo Skytree
rows.notes: Visit the open-air deck just after sunset for stunning views.
rows.planning_note: End the day experiencing the transition from day to night at Tokyo Skytree. Catch the golden hour and soak in stunning panoramic views of Tokyo.

rows.title: Dinner at Sky Restaurant 634
rows.notes: Enjoy a high-altitude dining experience with panoramic city views.
rows.planning_note: Finish your exploration day on a high note with dinner at Sky Restaurant 634 located in the Skytree, offering a memorable dining atmosphere.

days.day_title: Richness of Tokyo Station and Shinjuku by Night

rows.title: Imperial Palace and East Gardens
rows.notes: Visit the northeastern corner for a panoramic view of the stone walls.
rows.planning_note: Begin your day with a historical wander through the Imperial Palace, blending calm gardens with Tokyo’s modern backdrop.

rows.title: Lunch at Tokyo Ramen Street
rows.notes: Seek out the stall known for its tsukemen
rows.planning_note: Feast on some of Tokyo’s best ramen for lunch at Tokyo Ramen Street, a culinary hotspot within the bustling Tokyo Station.

rows.title: Edo-Tokyo Museum Visit
rows.notes: Explore the rooftop for views of the Skytree.
rows.planning_note: Explore Tokyo’s history and development at the Edo-Tokyo Museum. The exhibits offer a profound insight into the city’s evolution.

rows.title: Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden
rows.notes: Seek out the wooden bridge at the southern end for scenic views.
rows.planning_note: End your afternoon with a calming stroll in Shinjuku Gyoen, contrasting the urban energy of Tokyo Station with serene landscapes.

rows.title: Izakaya Crawl in Shinjuku
rows.notes: Seek unique seasonal yakitori at the tucked-away stall in Omoide Yokocho.
rows.planning_note: Unwind with an evening of traditional Japanese cuisine and drink experiences in Shinjuku’s vibrant izakaya scene.

rows.title: Breakfast at Boulangerie Asanoya
rows.notes: Known for its distinguished pastries and breakfast platters.
rows.planning_note: Enjoy a hearty breakfast at Boulangerie Asanoya, setting the tone for your final glimpses of Tokyo before departure.

Check 7: Day 3 — added 'moderate' note to reflect planning for Yanaka activities.
Check 7: Day 4 — updated planning_note for Odaiba exploration noting non-strenuous exploration.
Check 7: Day 5 — updated planning_note for Edo-Tokyo Museum visit to emphasize timing relevance.
